channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Countdown to Nashville's Star-Spangled Bash begins
item.description: Deana Ivey, president and CEO of the Nashville Convention & Visitors Corp, previews the July 4 celebration hosted by Ryan Seacrest.

item.title: U.S. says it will not extend key trade deal with Canada and Mexico
item.description: The USMCA remains in effect until 2036 unless the three countries negotiate a new agreement.

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule and viewing guide
item.description: With 104 matches across the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, the tournament is like a Super Bowl every day for five weeks, says U.S. captain Tim.

item.title: How much interest can a $55,000 CD account earn if opened now?
item.description: Interest earnings on a CD of this size can be significant. Here is what savers should consider.
